publishedAbstract: When CephFS is no longer serving I/O due to the MDSs transitioning from `up:active` to `up:replay` there is a need to stop clients from connecting to allow the MDSs time to complete the journal replay and `rejoin`. The process to accomplish this is a modified process derived from the following upstream documentation: [Troubleshooting CephFS STUCK IN UP:REPLAY](https://docs.ceph.com/en/quincy/cephfs/troubleshooting/#stuck-in-up-replay)
publishedTitle: CephFS MDSs Stuck in up:replay 1 filesystem is degraded - Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation
